## xComponentMixin() function

Initializes a component as an X-Component: \* Registers the module passed as parameter. \* Flags the component as X-Component, so then it can be detected with the [isXComponent()](./x-components.isxcomponent.md) function.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export declare function xComponentMixin(module: AnyXModule): ComponentOptions<Vue>;
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  module | [AnyXModule](./x-components.anyxmodule.md) | The module associated to the X-Component using this mixin. |

<b>Returns:</b>

ComponentOptions&lt;Vue&gt;

Mixin for the module.
